subject: Sinistea, a ghost Pokémon inhabiting a teacup, with swirling purple liquid and a ghostly presence
description: A small ornate teacup sits at the center of the composition, filled with swirling purple-teal liquid. A ghostly wispy form — the Pokémon itself — is visible within and around the cup, giving the impression of a spirit inhabiting the vessel. The teacup appears to be on a surface, with a soft purple-hued atmospheric background. The piece has a dreamlike, slightly unsettling quality: the everyday object rendered eerie by the supernatural presence within it.
foreground: ornate teacup with swirling purple liquid and ghostly wispy form
